creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 166272
Update to 0.12.6

Hello,
the attached patch updates x11/tint to 0.12.6. This is just another bugfix update. The patch was tested with Pouriere on 10.2, 10.2 and 9.3.

Changes to the port:
- Bump version number.
- New master site.

For changes to the application see https://gitlab.com/o9000/tint2/blob/0.12.6/ChangeLog

Regards,
Yamagi
